text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, look! Her legs look so baboom!And her shoulders are on show likedadam! Isn't this outfit super mature?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Wow, mature? Sure. But that's really,<n>well,
adventurous... It's way too soon for<n>Mayano to be
wearing this.)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Think I'm gonna buy it! ☆ Hehe,<n>everyone's gonna
be shocked by how<n>grown-up I'll look!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What?! Um... Hey, forget that! Check<n>this out. It's
a midi skirt, and the design's<n>really cute.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huuuh... But right now, I'd rather look<n>cool than
cute. I'm looking for mature<n>designs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: It's mature-casual, Mayano. Real adults<n>cover up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yep... Real adults know when to keep<n>things
hidden... and that's what makes<n>them the coolest!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! Hiding secrets really does<n>sound
super cool.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Palmer! Hehe, I'm gonna get the<n>skirt! ♪
